Convention, the accession of the Republic of Estonia to the said Convention, includiíg deposition of the instrument of accession adopted in accordance with national constitutional requirements.

the 27. Jantary 2005 became the Republic of Estonia an Associate State of

International Conference on Weights and Measures (CGPM). 23 March 2005 Central Office of Metrology, also functioning-as National Metrology lnstitute, AS Metrosert signed "Mutual

Weights and Measures (CIPM)Recognition Arrangement of the International Committee þr of naTional *noru**"nt standards and of calibration and measurement certificates issued by iational metrology institutes (CIPM MRA)" dated 14 October 1999. The Embassy confirms that AS Metrosert will continue to represent the Republic of Estonia in all related matters and the Republic of Estonia will avail itself of the various advantages and prerogatives offered by the BIPM to a Member State.

The Erírbassy.would be grateful to the BIPM to send an invoice to Ministry of Economic

Affairs and Communicaiions (Suur-Ameerika 1, Tallinn, 10122 ESTONIA, phone: +372 625 6342, e-mall: info@mkm.ee) to organize payment of the first annual contribution 57 783 euros and entratrõe fee of 0 euros totalling 57 783 euros by bank transfer or by cheque.

The Embassy of the Republic of Estonia avails itself of this opportunity to renew to the BIPM the assurances of its'highest consideration.

Copy of the Note Verbale, including deposition of the instrument of accession sent to the Þrench Ministry for.Europe and Foreign Affairs (Direction du Protocole) on 19"0t.202r

12, rue [e fa cBaume 25008 &øris - tét (33-1) 56 62 22 00 -fa4(33-1) 49 52 05 65 - www'est-em6'fr

REÇU LE

20 JAN. 2021

Eesti Vabariigi Suursaatkond

Ambassade de la République d'Estonie en France

M

N° 10.1-13/17

The Embassy of the Republic of Estonia in France presents its compliments to the

French Ministry for Europe and Foreign Affairs, and has the honour to hereby notify the accession of the Republic of Estonia to the Metre Convention, and hereby deposits the instrument of accession adopted in accordance with its national constitutional requirements.

Pursuant to Article III of the Metre Convention, the Republic of Estonia thus becomes a State Party (Member State) to the Metre Convention. The Embassy of the Republic of

Estonia has therefore the honour to request the Ministry to kindly acknowledge receipt of the present Note Verbale, and to notify all Member States, the President of the International

Committee for Weights and Measures (CIPM) and the Director of the International Bureau of

Weights and Measures (BIPM) of the said accession.

The Embassy of the Republic of Estonia avails itself of this opportunity to renew to the French Ministry for Europe and Foreign Affairs the assurances of its highest consideration.

Paris, 19 January 2021

French Ministry for Europe and Foreign Affairs

Attached: Instrument of accession

CC:

Dr Martin Milton

Director

International Bureau of Weights and Measures (BIPM)

Pavillon de Breteuil

F-92312 Sèvres Cedex

France

17, rue de la Baume 75008 Paris - tél (33-1) 56 62 22 00 - fax (33-1) 49 52 05 65 - www.est-emb.fr
